title: Real-Time Data with Tavily
tagline: Add live Tavily search to a Pinecone-backed book agent so stale domain knowledge can answer current questions.

story.problem: Cookbook #2 can recommend from a Pinecone-backed Goodreads corpus, but that corpus stops around 2017 and cannot carry constantly changing pricing, availability, editions, or newly released books.
story.solution: Keep Pinecone for curated domain memory, then add Tavily — a Nebius partner — for live web awareness. A three-step agent plans searches on a cheaper model, fetches fresh facts, then writes cited recommendations on Llama 70B.
story.outcome: An agent that can combine static book knowledge with fresh web context, stream every phase to the client, cite sources inline, and keep cost visible.

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY and TAVILY_API_KEY

endpoints.description: Stream the three-step agent: planning, searching, writing, citations, cost.
